nasb.text: They will be terrified, Pains and anguish will take hold of them; They will writhe like a woman in labor, They will look at one another in astonishment, Their faces aflame.

esv.text: They will be dismayed: pangs and agony will seize them; they will be in anguish like a woman in labor. They will look aghast at one another; their faces will be aflame.

cnv.text: 他們都要驚惶失措， 疼痛與痛苦必抓住他們； 他們必絞痛，像生產中的婦人一樣。 他們在驚愕中彼此對望， 面色像火燄一般。

ccb.text: 惊恐万状， 痛苦不堪如同分娩的妇人。 他们必面面相觑， 羞愧得面如火烧。

csbs.text: 他们必惶恐，剧痛和痛苦抓住他们； 他们必疼痛，像临产的妇人那样。 他们彼此惊奇对望，面色如火焰。
